regional_cost_note: Pool builders in Tauranga typically quote $36,000–$75,000 for a fibreglass pool installed and $52,000–$130,000+ for a concrete/gunite pool. Above-ground pools start from $3,500. Bay of Plenty rates are broadly in line with the national average. Building consent is required for most in-ground pools in NZ — confirm your builder handles consent and fencing compliance.
